BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because cookies created without secure flag.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: Attacker doesn't need prior access; they can intercept traffic in transit..

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: The impact is limited to the same application scope.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: This flaw doesn't enable modification of data.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is well known and demonstrable.

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: Developers can mitigate by setting isSecure=true.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Attacker doesn't need prior access; they can intercept traffic in transit.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: In certain environments, exposed cookies could yield greater access.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Environments handling sensitive user sessions/data may prioritize confidentiality.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Integrity is less of a concern here.
